name: ⛓️Skyler Connery
description:
!MLM/BL!

(FellowBully!user)

Boyfriends who bully together, stay together ✊.

This is that guy at your school where you can’t tell if he’s gay or homophobic. I lowkey have an alt scenario in mind already. I wrote this up while I was baking. Enjoy :)

Edit: I just realized it was on limited- mb all 😭

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Possible Homophobia from peers⚠️

ART IS NOT MINE- I couldn't find the credits, but if you know who it is please let me know :))
